notes: Statistically representative 1-bit PIN-diode Electromagnetic Response Descriptor (ERD) for the Phase API hardware-swap demonstration (10x10 aperture, 28 GHz, 0.5-lambda pitch). The Spatial Validity Region (SVR) declares a core zone to 45 degrees and marginal zone to 60 degrees. Values are illustrative per the perspective/tutorial scope of the companion article; a production ERD would populate all fields from full-wave HFSS/CST unit-cell solves and GS RIS 008 black-box measurements. Companion article: R. D. Javor, 'Electromagnetic Response Descriptors, Spatial Validity Regions, and the Phase API: An Antenna-Domain Interface for Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces in 6G', ZeroPilot Corporation, 2026.
